site_include.description: If non-empty, ONLY these fabric-site area names (site-hierarchy leaf) are converted. Empty = all sites.

device_naming.description: Device-name source for campus devices: 'hostname' (default), 'hostname_ip', or 'ip'.

strip_domain_suffix.description: Suffix removed from a device hostname when present (e.g. the dCloud domain). Set to "" to keep full FQDNs.

include_external_neighbors.description: Underlay: draw physical-topology neighbours that are NOT Catalyst-Center-managed devices as gray external waypoints.

vlan_base.description: Overlay: first synthetic VLAN id used for an anycast gateway that carries no vlanId.

include_endpoints.description: Overlay: draw real clients/hosts from the clients API beneath a segment in their site (host side = L3 IP, segment side = VLAN). No-op when the export carries no clients.

max_endpoints_per_vn.description: Overlay: cap on real clients drawn per segment; excess are noted in the report. Lower for very large deployments.

emit_sgt_flows.description: Flow list: emit SGT / group-based-access-control policy as flow rows (SD-Access is open within a VN; off by default. SGT flow emission is not implemented yet — currently always emits no rows).

color_overrides.description: Map of NS device name -> [R,G,B] to override the role-based colour (reserved).
